---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for KairuAI
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you imagine this working. Include pseudocode or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Links, references, or screenshots related to this request.
